Project: Secure Document Portal

Functional Requirements:
1. Users must be able to register and log in with MFA.
2. Users can upload PDF, DOCX, and TXT files up to 20 MB.
3. System must parse uploaded documents and extract key requirements.
4. Admins can manage user roles (viewer, editor, admin).
5. All documents are versioned; previous versions are retained.

Non-Functional Requirements:
1. System must support 99.9% uptime SLA.
2. Upload response time must not exceed 2 seconds.
3. All data at rest must be encrypted with AES-256.

Constraints:
1. Must run on Azure cloud infrastructure.
2. Must comply with GDPR and SOC2.

Assumptions:
1. Users have modern browsers (Chrome 100+, Firefox 100+).
2. Deployment region is EU-West.
